paper_statement: On the 6x6 synthetic routing experiment with 50 train and 50 held-out routes, the LP solution uses 52 edges at phi=0.75 and is significantly more compressed than forward and reverse greedy for all plotted phi <= 0.8.
assumptions: 85% uses a shortest path under i.i.d. Uniform[0.1,2] road weights
50 training and 50 held-out routes from the same mixture
fixed deterministic tie order because the source omits one

verification_rule.52_edge_result: at least one declared seed yields exactly 52 LP edges at phi=0.75
verification_rule.greedy_result: paired 95% t intervals for forward-minus-LP and reverse-minus-LP edge counts are strictly above zero at phi in {0.2,0.4,0.6,0.8}
verification_rule.integrity: independent route/set checker passes every seed and phi
